---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the scripts or guide
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

A clear description of the problem, for example, "The guide doesn't cover..." or "The kiosk script can't...".

## What would you like to happen?

A clear description of the change or addition you would like.

## Alternatives you have considered

Any workarounds or other approaches you have tried.

## Anything else?

Any other context, for example, the hardware or use case this would help with.
